nasb.text: Now this I say, he who sows sparingly will also reap sparingly, and he who sows bountifully will also reap bountifully.

esv.text: The point is this: whoever sows sparingly will also reap sparingly, and whoever sows bountifully will also reap bountifully.

cnv.text: 還有，少種的少收，多種的多收。

ccb.text: 要记住：“少种的少收，多种的多收。”

csbs.text: 又有这话：播撒吝啬的人，也收获吝啬；播撒祝福的人，也收获祝福。
